data.user_prompt: What are good therapy options in Louisville for anxiety and depression?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response claude What are good therapy options in Louisville for anxiety and depression?

sections.text:
Great news — there are several strong therapy options in Louisville for anxiety and depression, ranging from specialized clinics to large counseling networks. Here's a breakdown:

---

## 🧠 Therapy Options in Louisville, KY for Anxiety & Depression

---

### 1. 🏆 **KY CARDS (Kentucky Center for Anxiety and Related Disorders)**
🌐 [kycards.com](https://kycards.com)
KY CARDS provides specialized treatment for anxiety, OCD, and related disorders.

annotations.title: Anxiety and OCD Treatment in Kentucky | KY Cards

sections.text: Their clinicians use Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) and Exposure Therapy — proven, structured approaches that help you retrain anxious thoughts and behaviors.

annotations.title: Anxiety and OCD Treatment in Kentucky | KY Cards

sections.text: Therapy is focused, time-limited, and results-driven — most clients complete treatment in about 8 to 20 weeks.

annotations.title: Anxiety and OCD Treatment in Kentucky | KY Cards

sections.text: Their team also works with children and teens.

annotations.title: Anxiety and OCD Treatment in Kentucky | KY Cards

sections.text:
---

### 2. 🏥 **Grace Psychological Services**
🌐 [louisvillegracepsychological.com](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/anxiety-therapy-treatment/)
Grace Psychological Services uses Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), the gold standard for treating anxiety, and provides personalized, evidence-based support tailored to your unique needs.

annotations.title: Anxiety Therapy Louisville, KY | Grace Psychological Services

sections.text: As an evidence-based practice committed to Measurement-Based Care, they utilize gold-standard clinical instruments such as the PHQ-9, GAD-7, and BDI-II (Beck Depression Inventory).

annotations.title: Anxiety Therapy Louisville, KY | Grace Psychological Services

sections.text: They offer face-to-face appointments in Louisville (Middletown area) as well as anxiety therapy online via a HIPAA-compliant telehealth platform.

annotations.title: Anxiety Therapy Louisville, KY | Grace Psychological Services

sections.text:
---

### 3. 🏢 **Kentucky Mental Health Care (KMHC)**
🌐 [kentuckymentalhealth.com](https://kentuckymentalhealth.com)
KMHC's psychiatrists are renowned for their individualized care and treat severe depression, anxiety disorders, PTSD, bipolar disorders, and more.

annotations.title: Kentucky Mental Health Care – Psychiatry | Therapy | Addiction Treatment

sections.text: They also offer Intensive Outpatient Programs (IOPs) in Louisville, designed for those experiencing a greater level of need.

annotations.title: Kentucky Mental Health Care – Psychiatry | Therapy | Addiction Treatment

sections.text: IOPs meet online and in-person three times per week for three hours each session, while still allowing you to participate in your normal daily life.

annotations.title: Kentucky Mental Health Care – Psychiatry | Therapy | Addiction Treatment

sections.text:
You can reach them at **(502) 233-3030**.

---

### 4. 🌿 **Louisville Health & Healing**
🌐 [louisvillehealthandhealing.com](https://www.louisvillehealthandhealing.com)
They offer EMDR, IFS, and expressive techniques, with appointments available within 7 days.

annotations.title: Private Therapy Louisville KY | Louisville Health & Healing

sections.text: They provide individual therapy for adults navigating anxiety, trauma, burnout, and life transitions.

annotations.title: Private Therapy Louisville KY | Louisville Health & Healing

sections.text: They also offer Ketamine Assisted Psychotherapy for treatment-resistant depression.

annotations.title: Private Therapy Louisville KY | Louisville Health & Healing

sections.text: Hours are Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m. – 8:00 p.m.

annotations.title: Private Therapy Louisville KY | Louisville Health & Healing

sections.text:
---

### 5. 📋 **Kentucky Counseling Center (KCC)**
🌐 [kentuckycounselingcenter.com](https://kentuckycounselingcenter.com)

Kentucky Counseling Center offers online mental health services such as counseling, psychiatry, and targeted case management, and their large network of providers allows them to schedule appointments quickly — in as little as the same week.

annotations.title: Mental Health Counseling and Psychiatry | Kentucky Counseling Center
